title: Delivery Methods
subtitle: Define how data is delivered to consumers via deliverables (e.g., Table Access, Serving Endpoint).

permissions.deniedView: You do not have permission to view delivery methods.
permissions.deniedCreate: You do not have permission to create delivery methods.
permissions.deniedEdit: You do not have permission to edit delivery methods.
permissions.deniedDelete: You do not have permission to delete delivery methods.

messages.deletedSuccess: The delivery method was successfully deleted.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Delivery Method?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. Existing deliverables using this method may become orphaned.

emptyState.title: No delivery methods defined yet
emptyState.description: Create your first delivery method (e.g., Table Access, Serving Endpoint, File Export).
